chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1350 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 18-04-2024 Mr. Gul Feroze Kalwar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sawan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G-Sindh. Mouzzam Ali Lohar, Executive Engineer, Irrigation Mirpur Division, Additional SHO, P.S, Mirpur, and respondent No.7 are present. ***** Executive Engineer, Irrigation, Mirpur Division is present and submits that nowadays closure in watercourse etc. is being maintained in Sindh and as soon as it is lifted, water to the petitioner’s land as per his entitlement and water share-list would be provided and in case, if anyone causes hindrance to the flow of water to the lands of the petitioner including respondent No.7, who is present in person, an action against him would be taken against in accordance with law including registration of FIR etc. SHO, P.S, Mirpur Mathelo has also reiterated the same statement and therefore in the light of their statements and undertaking, this petition is disposed of. However, if any one violates the terms of this order, he would be exposed to contempt proceedings. This petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. Office to communicate copy of this order to AAG for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
